tripOverview.intro: London in April offers perfect romantic spring weather with blooming parks and vibrant energy. Experience world-class culture, diverse cuisine, and charming neighborhoods with your loved one.
tripOverview.vibe: A whirlwind romantic adventure through London's historic streets, vibrant markets, and cultural treasures.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April to June and September to November offer mild weather and fewer crowds

attractions.name: Tower of London
attractions.desc: Historic fortress housing the Crown Jewels and centuries of royal history.

attractions.name: British Museum
attractions.desc: World-renowned museum featuring artifacts from ancient civilizations worldwide.

attractions.name: Covent Garden
attractions.desc: Vibrant district with street performers, boutique shops, and dining options.

attractions.name: Tate Modern
attractions.desc: Leading modern art gallery housed in a former power station.

destinationOverview.transportation: London has an extensive public transport network including the Underground (Tube), buses, and overground trains. Black cabs are iconic but expensive, while Uber and Bolt offer convenient rideshare options. Consider getting an Oyster Card or using contactless payment for seamless travel across all transport modes.
destinationOverview.tip: Download the Citymapper app for real-time transport updates and always stand right on escalators - London is LGBTQ+ friendly with Soho being a particularly welcoming area.
destinationOverview.safety: London is very safe for tourists with low crime rates and excellent emergency services.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with Airalo eSIM for instant data access without roaming charges throughout the UK.

days.intro: Start your romantic London adventure exploring iconic landmarks and historic sites.

morning.name: Tower of London
morning.desc: Explore the historic fortress and see the Crown Jewels together.

morning.name: Tower Bridge
morning.desc: Walk across London's most famous bridge with stunning Thames views.

afternoon.name: Borough Market Lunch
afternoon.desc: Sample diverse vegetarian street food at London's oldest food market.

afternoon.name: Thames River Cruise
afternoon.desc: Enjoy a romantic cruise along the Thames seeing London from the water.

evening.name: Covent Garden
evening.desc: Stroll through the historic market area with street performers and shops.

evening.name: Dinner at Dishoom
evening.desc: Experience exceptional Indian cuisine in a romantic Bombay café setting.

days.tip: Book Tower of London tickets online to skip queues and arrive early for smaller crowds.

days.intro: Immerse yourselves in London's green spaces and vibrant market culture.

morning.name: Hyde Park & Speaker's Corner
morning.desc: Stroll through London's largest park and see the historic Speaker's Corner.

morning.name: Portobello Road Market
morning.desc: Browse antiques and vintage finds in this famous Notting Hill market.

afternoon.name: Borough Market Return
afternoon.desc: Return to Borough Market for vegetarian delicacies and artisanal treats.

afternoon.name: Southwark Cathedral
afternoon.desc: Visit London's oldest Gothic church near Borough Market.

evening.name: Tate Modern
evening.desc: Explore contemporary art with your partner in this iconic gallery.

evening.name: South Bank Walk
evening.desc: Take a romantic evening stroll along the Thames South Bank.

days.tip: Borough Market is busiest on Saturdays - visit early morning or late afternoon for a more romantic experience.

days.intro: End your London adventure with world-class culture and romantic moments.

morning.name: British Museum
morning.desc: Discover ancient treasures and world cultures in this magnificent museum.

morning.name: Russell Square Gardens
morning.desc: Relax in peaceful gardens near the British Museum.

afternoon.name: Fitzrovia Lunch
afternoon.desc: Enjoy vegetarian cuisine in trendy Fitzrovia neighborhood.

afternoon.name: Regent's Park
afternoon.desc: Wander through beautiful rose gardens and Queen Mary's Gardens.

evening.name: Primrose Hill Sunset
evening.desc: Watch the sunset over London's skyline from this romantic viewpoint.

evening.name: Camden Market
evening.desc: Explore alternative culture and unique finds in vibrant Camden.

days.tip: Book timed entry for British Museum online and head to Primrose Hill 30 minutes before sunset for the best views.

food.intro: London's diverse food scene offers exceptional vegetarian and Indian cuisine perfect for adventurous couples.
food.tip: Many pubs offer excellent vegetarian options and most restaurants are accommodating to dietary requirements when informed in advance.

neighborhoods.name: South Bank
neighborhoods.desc: Thames-side location near Borough Market and attractions
neighborhoods.whyStay: Walking distance to Borough Market and riverside romance

neighborhoods.name: Covent Garden
neighborhoods.desc: Central location with theaters, shops, and restaurants
neighborhoods.whyStay: Heart of London with easy access to everything

neighborhoods.name: Shoreditch
neighborhoods.desc: Trendy area with vibrant nightlife and LGBTQ+ scene
neighborhoods.whyStay: Alternative culture and trendy dining scene

hotels.tip: Book South Bank area hotels for easy access to Borough Market and romantic Thames walks.

getYourGuide.name: London Food Walking Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Discover Borough Market and local vegetarian gems with expert guide.

getYourGuide.name: Thames Sunset Cruise
getYourGuide.desc: Romantic evening cruise with champagne and city skyline views.

getYourGuide.name: Royal London Walking Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Explore royal palaces and historic sites with entertaining guide.

hiddenGems.name: Leadenhall Market
hiddenGems.desc: Victorian market featured in Harry Potter films with unique architecture.

hiddenGems.name: God's Own Junkyard
hiddenGems.desc: Neon art gallery showcasing vintage signs and electric art.

hiddenGems.name: Dennis Severs House
hiddenGems.desc: Immersive Georgian house experience telling stories through rooms.

packing.title: April London Packing Guide
packing.intro: Pack layers for mild spring weather with occasional rain showers and cool evenings.
packing.luggage: A wheeled carry-on suitcase plus personal daypack works well for this short city break.
packing.tip: London weather can change quickly in April, so pack versatile layers you can add or remove throughout the day.

bookTrip.intro: Round-trip flights from Philadelphia to London typically cost $600-800 per person in April.
